/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libstm32_diff_drive_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libstm32_diff_drive_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/stm32_diff_drive_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/stm32_diff_drive_msgs/msg/detail/motor_command__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/stm32_diff_drive_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/stm32_diff_drive_msgs/msg/detail/motor_vels__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/stm32_diff_drive_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/stm32_diff_drive_msgs/msg/detail/encoder_vals__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
